meaning: n.功课,(一节)课,[pl.] 课程,教训
examples: I've got a piano lesson later today.
Our first lesson on Tuesdays is French.
She hadn't been attending during the lesson.
But the drink taught me an important lesson: Manhattans are not to be ordered indiscriminately.
The lesson Cohen learned was to change strategies and not be straight-jacketed by your original business model.
